card_description: Büber is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick identifies himself and other "secret Christians" as "phagocytes" or "metabolic toxins" sent into the world-organism to dissolve the "malignant complex" that is the Black Iron Prison (BIP)."
